description_long: This is a modern, low-profile coffee table with an octagonal green marble top, supported by four angled wooden legs. The tabletop has a polished, smooth finish with subtle white veining characteristic of natural marble. The legs are tapered and made of dark-stained wood, providing a sturdy yet elegant base. The table's geometric shape and material combination give it a contemporary and sophisticated appearance, suitable for upscale urban environments. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional features, emphasizing a minimalist design. The table is designed to serve as a central piece for social or lounge areas, offering a durable and attractive surface.
description: A modern octagonal green marble coffee table with four angled wooden legs and a polished, smooth finish. Its minimalist design and sturdy build make it ideal for urban lounge or social spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide octagonal marble top and two visible angled wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the tabletop and the thickness of the marble, with one leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the octagonal marble top and two rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the tabletop's narrow edge and a single leg.
